# yp (YitPush)

> AI-powered CLI tool for Git commit automation and Azure DevOps management.
> Supports multiple AI providers: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, DeepSeek, OpenRouter.

## Project

- Version: 2.0.0
- Language: C# / .NET 10
- Install: `dotnet tool install -g YitPush`
- Command: `yp`
- Repository: https://github.com/elvisbrevi/yitpush

## Commands

- `yp setup` — interactive wizard to configure AI provider and API key
- `yp commit` — stage, commit and push with an AI-generated message
- `yp pr` — generate a pull request description between two branches
- `yp checkout` — interactive branch checkout
- `yp azure-devops` — Azure DevOps management (repos, user stories, tasks, links)

## Key flags

- `--language <lang>`, `--lang`, `-l` — output language for commit/PR (default: english)
- `--detailed` — generate a detailed commit or PR description with full body
- `--confirm` — require confirmation before committing (commit only)
- `--save` — save output to a markdown file

## Configuration

Config file: `~/.yitpush/config.json`
Supported providers: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, OpenRouter

## Documentation

- README: /README.md
- Changelog: /CHANGELOG.md
- Quickstart: /QUICKSTART.md
- Full docs: /llms-full.txt
